message:
Fix executor docs: await_task/process_task apply to all operators

Move await_task() and process_task() from the "Sources" section to the
"Common Methods" section since these methods exist in OperatorBase and
are inherited by all operator types. The documentation now clarifies that
sources are the primary users while non-sources typically use the default
implementation (sleep forever).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
